zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Egerton於1372年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Ralph de Wilbraham33歲，母親Agnes Caldecote37歲。他於1395年12月與Ellin Haukeston在英國爾維布波瑞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1420年10月31日享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Egerton于1372年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Ralph de Wilbraham33岁，母亲Agnes Caldecote37岁。他于1395年12月与Ellin Haukeston在英国爾維布波瑞结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1420年10月31日享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Egerton was born in 1372, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Ralph de Wilbraham, was 33 and his mother, Agnes Caldecote, was 37. He married Ellin Haukeston in December 1395, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 31 October 1420, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d’Egerton est né en 1372, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Wilbraham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Caldecote, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Ellin Haukeston en décembre 1395, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 31 octobre 1420, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Egerton 1372 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Wilbraham 33 und seine Mutter Agnes Caldecote 37. Er hat im Dezember 1395 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England Ellin Haukeston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 31. Oktober 1420 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Egerton è nato il nel 1372 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Wilbraham, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Caldecote, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Ellin Haukeston nel dicembre 1395, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 31 ottobre 1420, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Egertonが1372年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph de Wilbrahamは33歳，母Agnes Caldecoteは37歳であった。1395年12月にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーでEllin Haukestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1420年10月31日に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Egerton(이)가 1372년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Wilbraham(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Caldecote(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1395년 12월 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 Ellin Haukeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 10월 31일 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Egerton nasceu em 1372, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Wilbraham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Caldecote, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellin Haukeston em dezembro de 1395, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1420, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Egerton родился в 1372 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Wilbraham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Caldecote, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellin Haukeston декабрь 1395 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 31 октября 1420 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Egerton nació en 1372, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Wilbraham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes Caldecote, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Ellin Haukeston en diciembre de 1395, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1420, a la edad de 48 años.
